name: devin-memento
description: A nightly sleep cycle for Devin: self-improving SKILL.md + built-in memory (BM25+vector search, tiers, knowledge graph, lessons, dashboard).
long_description: memento gives Devin a nightly self-evolution cycle (harvest -> mine -> replay -> validation gate -> adopt) plus a stdlib-only memory engine with hybrid search, a knowledge graph, auto-derived and manual lessons, and a local web dashboard. The sleep-cycle tools require a local clone of microsoft/SkillOpt at MEMENTO_ENGINE_REPO; the memory tools work without it.

tools.name: memento_status
tools.description: Show how many Memento nights have run and the latest staged proposal.

tools.name: memento_dry_run
tools.description: Preview a sleep cycle (harvest+mine+replay) without staging anything.

tools.name: memento_run
tools.description: Run a full sleep cycle; stages a reviewed proposal.

tools.name: memento_adopt
tools.description: Apply the latest staged proposal to the managed SKILL.

tools.name: memento_harvest
tools.description: Debug: list the recurring tasks mined from recent Devin sessions.

tools.name: memento_auto
tools.description: Fully automatic: run a sleep cycle and immediately adopt the staged proposal.

tools.name: memory_save
tools.description: Persist a memory to memento's built-in store (SQLite).

tools.name: memory_recall
tools.description: Search memories by relevance.

tools.name: memory_list
tools.description: List recent memories (optional tier / session filter).

tools.name: memory_forget
tools.description: Delete a memory by id, or all memories matching a query.

tools.name: memory_sessions
tools.description: List sessions that have saved memories, with counts.

tools.name: memory_stats
tools.description: Memory store stats: totals, per-tier counts, search backend.

tools.name: memory_dashboard
tools.description: Start the local web dashboard to browse/search/add memories; returns its URL.

tools.name: memory_related
tools.description: Knowledge-graph: memories sharing an entity with the given memory id.

tools.name: memory_graph
tools.description: Knowledge-graph overview: top entities and link counts.

tools.name: memory_capture
tools.description: Capture-hook: record an agent lifecycle event (SessionStart, PreToolUse, …) as a working memory.

tools.name: memory_consolidate
tools.description: Lifecycle: promote reinforced memories up a tier and auto-forget stale, never-accessed working memories.

tools.name: memory_pin
tools.description: Pin (or unpin) a memory so decay/consolidation never removes it.

tools.name: memory_namespaces
tools.description: Governance: list memory namespaces (scopes) with counts.

tools.name: memory_snapshot
tools.description: Governance: write a git-versionable snapshot of all memories.

tools.name: memory_restore
tools.description: Governance: restore memories from a snapshot file.

tools.name: memory_audit
tools.description: Governance: recent audit-log entries (saves, forgets, consolidations).

tools.name: memory_learn
tools.description: Lessons: derive insights from recurring patterns (entities, tags, failures) into the semantic tier.

tools.name: memory_lessons
tools.description: Lessons: list derived lessons (semantic insights from patterns).

engine_repo.title: SkillOpt engine path
engine_repo.description: Local clone of microsoft/SkillOpt. Needed for the sleep-cycle tools; the memory tools work without it.

home.title: Data directory
home.description: Where memento stores runtime data, the memory DB, and learned skills.
